title: A Softish Landing
text: U.S. equity markets resumed their rebound this past week as investors parsed a busy slate of corporate earnings results and economic data ahead of the Federal Reserve's rate hike decision. Gaining for the third week in the past four, the S&P 500 advanced 2.5% on the week while the tech-heavy Nasdaq rallied nearly 5% - its fourth-straight week of gains.

title: Why I Quit Private Equity Real Estate To Buy REITs Instead
text: Private real estate funds claim they can earn you "high returns." But they typically underperform REITs despite taking a lot more risks.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2022 Distributions
text: HOUSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) announced today the income tax characteristics of its 2022 distributions paid to shareholders as they will be reported on Form 1099-DIV. title: Camden Property Trust Announces Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
text: HOUSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) announced today that its fourth quarter 2022 earnings will be released after the market closes on Thursday, February 2, 2023. Management will host a conference call on the following day, Friday, February 3, 2023 at 10:00 AM Central Time.

title: The Buy-Hold-And-Go-Fishing REIT Portfolio
text: Many former landlords look to obtain income from REITs, seeking to escape the need for close monitoring or worry. This article considers sensible expectations and sensible objectives for such investments.
